phases.title: Concept And Product Direction
phases.summary: Stack, migration direction, business constraints, and platform posture are locked.

phases.title: Foundation And Shared Runtime
phases.summary: Monorepo, shared package, Supabase client wiring, strict TypeScript, and platform shells are in place.

phases.title: Auth, Profiles, And Onboarding
phases.summary: Auth, onboarding, profile hydration, and profile editing are wired across web and native.
milestones: Onboarding writes into locked users row
Profile and edit flows live on both platforms

phases.title: Marketplace Core
phases.summary: Brand publish/review flows and creator browse/apply flows exist across web and native; the next gap is end-to-end QA against real sessions.
milestones: Brand dashboard and campaign builder exist
Creator catalog, details, and applications exist

phases.title: Submission And Payout Loop
phases.summary: Submission, verification, and payout confirmation are wired on brand web and creator native; the next gap is full happy-path and failure-path QA.

phases.title: Premium Design And Product Cohesion
phases.summary: Dark Premium Moody is now the default across the major web and native product surfaces; formal owner review is next before final polish locks it.
milestones: Landing, auth, onboarding, and dashboard upgraded
Structured color, typography, motion, and density review still needs approval

phases.title: QA, Store Prep, And Launch
phases.summary: Release operations, compliance copy, full QA, and store submission prep still need dedicated execution.
milestones: App Store and Play Store packaging not started

workstreams.name: Web Brand Workspace
workstreams.detail: Operator-facing dashboard, campaign builder, applicant review, submissions, and local mission-control support are dark-system aligned and build cleanly.

workstreams.name: Native Creator App
workstreams.detail: Creator home, catalog, detail, submissions, applications, onboarding, and profile surfaces are converted to the dark premium system and bundle on iOS.

workstreams.name: Shared Data Layer
workstreams.detail: Supabase client, shared hooks, query logic, and stores are ported and driving both platforms.

workstreams.name: Design System
workstreams.detail: Dark Premium Moody exists on web and native; color, typography, motion, and layout density need owner approval before final polish hardens.

workstreams.name: Design Review And Approval
workstreams.detail: Core surfaces are strong enough to review now, but the visual direction is still intentionally adjustable before deeper polish locks it in.

workstreams.name: Runtime Stability
workstreams.detail: The customer product typechecks and builds cleanly; Expo iOS bundles, but simulator tooling still needs steady screenshot/device-inspection reliability.

workstreams.name: Release Readiness
workstreams.detail: Store packaging, submission assets, compliance copy, and final launch checklists still need to be built.

recentUpdates.title: Split-stack platform foundation established
recentUpdates.detail: Monorepo, shared package, web shell, native shell, and locked-backend data layer were stood up inside BUDCASTAPP.

recentUpdates.title: Auth, onboarding, and profile flows shipped
recentUpdates.detail: Shared auth hydration, onboarding persistence, and profile editing now work across web and native.

recentUpdates.title: Core marketplace loops shipped
recentUpdates.detail: Brand campaign creation, applicant review, creator discovery, applications, submission proof, and payout confirmation are in place.

recentUpdates.title: Dark Premium Moody system applied across web and native
recentUpdates.detail: Brand web routes, creator native routes, auth, onboarding, profile, marketplace, submissions, and campaign detail screens now share the approved dark premium language.

recentUpdates.title: Design checkpoint added to the build process
recentUpdates.detail: Mission control now treats visual review as a first-class step so color, typography, motion, and density can be approved or pivoted before final polish.

recentUpdates.title: Owner-facing mission control started
recentUpdates.detail: A local-only command center is being added to track progress, blockers, and build health while the product is under construction.

blockers: Simulator screenshot/device-inspection tooling is intermittently failing through CoreSimulatorService even though Expo iOS bundles successfully.
The design system is intentionally not visually locked yet; a formal review pass is still needed before final polish.
Store-prep work has not started yet, so launch readiness is still operationally early.
nextMoves: Review the current visual direction across landing, dashboard, onboarding, creator home, marketplace, submissions, and campaign builder before locking colors and polish.
Decide whether the current color system, typography, motion, and density should stay or pivot while the UI system is still flexible.
Run end-to-end creator and brand QA with real seeded accounts across apply, accept, submit proof, verify, and confirm payout.
Tighten empty, loading, error, and success states after the design checkpoint.
Move into QA and release-prep planning once the local product loop is visually and functionally stable.

launchChecklist.name: Design approval checkpoint
launchChecklist.detail: Visual direction is reviewable now, but colors, typography, motion, and overall premium tone are not locked yet.

launchChecklist.name: Brand web workflow
launchChecklist.detail: Publish, review, and submissions exist, but need QA and finish work.

launchChecklist.name: Creator native workflow
launchChecklist.detail: Discovery, applications, profile, campaign detail, and submissions are visually converted and bundle on iOS; full real-session QA remains.

launchChecklist.name: Environment readiness
launchChecklist.detail: Supabase public env vars load locally; remaining readiness work is seeded real-session QA and launch environment discipline.

launchChecklist.name: App Store prep
launchChecklist.detail: Store packaging, listing assets, and submission workflow not started.

launchChecklist.name: Play Store prep
launchChecklist.detail: Android packaging and listing assets not started.

launchChecklist.name: Compliance and copy review
launchChecklist.detail: Cannabis-adjacent positioning and store-facing copy still need a launch pass.
